company_domain.description: Primary domain of the target company, e.g., 'acmefinancial.com'

company_name.description: Human-readable company name to improve search quality

target_personas.description: Optional list of persona types to prioritize. If omitted, agent will use standard economic buyer + champion discovery.

icp_criteria.description: Optional ICP output from icp_builder. Used to identify the most relevant buyer personas for this specific ICP.
